response.justification: Candidate has solid generalist software experience across web, mobile, and some embedded-adjacent work, but lacks the core requirements for this role: no native-level Japanese, no demonstrated C-for-UNIX embedded firmware focus in recent roles, no Linux kernel modification experience, and no security/networking specialization (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3 switching, NETCONF/SNMP). The profile points toward full-stack/TypeScript work, not LAN-switch embedded security.
strengths: Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Long, varied software career with embedded and systems-adjacent projects
Strong testing/TDD discipline and craftsmanship mindset
concerns: No native-level Japanese language proficiency indicated
No experience with switch security stack (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, L2/L3)
No Linux kernel source modification or embedded firmware development history

key_factors.factor: Minimal recent C/UNIX and kernel work
